text:
Software Engineer at Stripe

Stripe is hiring a Software Engineer for our San Francisco office. We're looking for someone with at least 3 years of experience in distributed systems. Compensation: $140,000 - $180,000/year plus equity.

Join our growing team as a Data Scientist! Acme Analytics is based in Austin, TX. This is a senior role — we expect candidates to bring 5+ years of experience working with ML models in production. We offer a competitive salary between $120k and $150k annually.

Product Manager – Remote

We are a fully distributed team looking for an experienced Product Manager. No office required — work from anywhere in the US. Ideal candidate has 4-6 years of product experience. Salary not disclosed at this stage.

DevOps Engineer
Company: CloudNine Inc.
Location: Seattle, WA (hybrid)
Salary: $110,000 – $135,000
We're looking for a DevOps Engineer with 2+ years hands-on experience with Kubernetes and CI/CD pipelines.

Frontend Developer wanted for a fast-moving startup in New York City. Must know React and TypeScript. We don't require a specific number of years — what matters is what you've shipped. Pay is $85/hr on a contract basis.

Quantitative Analyst – Jane Street, New York

Jane Street is seeking a Quantitative Analyst to join our research team. Candidates should have a graduate degree and ideally 1-3 years of industry experience. Total compensation typically ranges from $200,000 to $400,000 including bonus.

We're hiring a Technical Recruiter at our Chicago headquarters. This role sits within the People team at Beacon HR. Entry-level applicants welcome — no prior recruiting experience required. Base pay starts at $55,000.

Customer Success Manager

FullContact is looking for a Customer Success Manager for our Denver office. You'll own a portfolio of enterprise accounts. Requires 3 years in a customer-facing SaaS role. Compensation: $70,000 base + commission.

Machine Learning Engineer — NVIDIA
Santa Clara, CA

NVIDIA's AI Research team has an opening for a Machine Learning Engineer. You will work on large-scale model training infrastructure. We require a minimum of 6 years of relevant experience. Compensation will be discussed during the hiring process.

Marketing Coordinator needed for a boutique agency in Portland, Oregon. The role is fully on-site. Fresh graduates encouraged to apply. The position pays $20/hour. No company name listed on this posting.

Senior Backend Engineer

At Figma (San Francisco, CA), we're growing the infrastructure team. This senior role expects 7+ years of backend engineering experience. We offer $170,000 – $220,000 base salary, equity, and full benefits.

Data Engineer
Location: Remote (must overlap with EST)
Company: DataFlow Systems

We need a Data Engineer comfortable with dbt, Spark, and Airflow. 4 years minimum. Salary range: $105,000 to $125,000.

UX Designer — Apple, Cupertino

Apple is looking for a UX Designer with a strong portfolio and 5 years of experience designing consumer-facing products. The pay band for this role is $130,000 – $160,000 per year.

Seeking a Biostatistician for a full-time role at Boston Medical Center. Must have at least 2 years post-PhD or 5 years with a master's degree. Boston, MA preferred but open to remote arrangements. Competitive compensation based on experience.

IT Support Specialist
This is an entry-level, on-site position in Dallas, Texas. The employer prefers candidates who have completed a relevant certification. Hourly rate: $18 – $22/hr. Employer not disclosed.

Embedded Systems Engineer at Rivian (Normal, IL). We're building the next generation of EV software. You need 4+ years working with real-time operating systems and CAN bus protocols. Total comp range: $115k – $145k.

Legal Counsel – Remote (US only)

A Series B fintech company is looking for its first in-house Legal Counsel. Qualified candidates will have 6-10 years of experience at a top law firm or in-house. Equity-heavy offer with base salary between $150,000 and $190,000.

Content Writer
Full-time, Miami, FL
Our media company needs a Content Writer to produce 3–5 articles per week. Open to candidates with 1-2 years of writing experience. $50,000/year salary. Company name withheld.

Staff Security Engineer
CrowdStrike — Austin, TX or Remote

CrowdStrike is expanding its Red Team. We're looking for a Staff Security Engineer with 8+ years of offensive security experience. Salary: $175,000 – $210,000 plus bonus and equity.

Operations Manager

Immediate opening for an Operations Manager at GreenPath Logistics. This is an on-site role in Memphis, TN. We prefer at least 5 years of supply chain or logistics management experience. Salary and benefits package to be discussed during the interview.

Registered Nurse – ICU
Hospital: Cedars-Sinai Medical Center
Location: Los Angeles, CA
Salary: $95,000 – $115,000/year
Minimum 2 years ICU experience required. BSN required, MSN preferred.

Medical Billing Specialist needed in Phoenix, AZ. No experience necessary — we train the right candidate. Pay is $17/hr to start with raises at 90 days. Apply through the company portal (company name confidential).

Clinical Research Coordinator — Mayo Clinic, Rochester MN. Join our oncology trials team. We require 3 years of clinical research experience and CCRP certification preferred. Salary is competitive and commensurate with experience.

Pharmacy Technician

We have an immediate opening at a busy retail pharmacy in Atlanta, GA. Prior pharmacy tech experience of at least 1 year preferred. Pay range: $16 – $20/hr depending on certification status.

Physical Therapist — Apex Rehab Group
Boston, MA (multiple clinic locations)

Apex Rehab Group is hiring licensed Physical Therapists. New grads welcome. Starting salary $72,000/year with annual performance bonuses.

Healthcare Data Analyst
Remote | Humana

Humana is looking for a Healthcare Data Analyst to join our Population Health team. 3-5 years of experience with claims data and SQL required. Salary: $80,000 – $95,000.

Attending Surgeon (General Surgery)
University of Michigan Health, Ann Arbor MI. Candidates must have completed a general surgery residency and be board-eligible or board-certified. Compensation package includes base salary, RVU bonus, and academic protected time. Details provided to shortlisted candidates.
We need a Medical Receptionist for a busy family practice in San Diego. This is a part-time, on-site role (20 hrs/week). No prior medical office experience required but preferred. Pay: $18/hr.

Diagnostic Radiologist
RadNet — multiple locations across California

Board-certified Radiologists needed to read CT, MRI, and X-ray studies. Fellowship training preferred. Highly competitive compensation: $400,000 – $550,000/year.

Healthcare IT Specialist
Position: Full-time, on-site
Location: Houston, TX
Employer: Memorial Hermann Health System
Experience: 2+ years supporting Epic EHR systems
Salary: $65,000 – $78,000

Financial Analyst — Goldman Sachs, New York

Goldman Sachs is hiring Financial Analysts for its Investment Banking Division. Recent graduates with strong quantitative backgrounds encouraged to apply. Starting salary $110,000 plus year-end bonus.

Credit Risk Analyst

A regional bank in Charlotte, NC seeks a Credit Risk Analyst with 3-5 years of commercial lending experience. Salary band: $75,000 to $90,000. Hybrid schedule. Bank name withheld.

Wealth Management Advisor
Fidelity Investments | Boston, MA

Fidelity is growing its Private Wealth Management team. Series 7 and 65 required. 5+ years advising high-net-worth clients. Total comp (salary + commissions) typically $150,000 – $250,000.

Compliance Officer — Remote

A fintech startup is building out its compliance function. We need someone with at least 4 years of BSA/AML experience. Compensation: $100,000 – $125,000. Company identity disclosed after NDA.

Entry-Level Actuarial Analyst
Progressive Insurance, Mayfield Village OH

Recent graduates with Exam P or FM passed are encouraged to apply. Salary: $65,000 – $75,000 plus exam support and study time.

Treasury Manager
Location: Minneapolis, MN
Company: Target Corporation

Target is looking for a Treasury Manager with 6 years of corporate treasury experience. Salary range not posted — will be shared with candidates who advance to the phone screen.

Mortgage Loan Officer — Wells Fargo
Multiple locations: Phoenix AZ, Las Vegas NV, Salt Lake City UT
NMLS license required. 2+ years origination experience. Commission-based role, average earnings $90,000 – $130,000/year.

Portfolio Manager

A hedge fund based in Stamford, CT is seeking a Portfolio Manager for its long/short equity strategy. 7 years minimum of fundamental investing experience required. Compensation is performance-based and highly competitive.

Insurance Underwriter (Commercial Lines)
Travelers | Hartford, CT

Travelers Insurance has an opening for a Commercial Lines Underwriter. 3 years of P&C underwriting experience required. Base salary $70,000 – $85,000 plus bonus.

Investment Banking Associate

Bulge-bracket bank in New York. MBA or 2+ years of analyst experience required. Compensation: $175,000 base + $100,000+ bonus (firm not named at this stage).

High School Mathematics Teacher
Chicago Public Schools | Chicago, IL

CPS is hiring certified math teachers for grades 9-12. Illinois teaching certificate required. Starting salary $58,000/year on the CPS salary schedule. New teachers welcome.

Assistant Professor of Computer Science
University of Washington, Seattle

The Paul G. Allen School is searching for an Assistant Professor specializing in systems or ML. PhD required. Competitive salary and startup package; details provided to applicants.

Instructional Designer — Remote
Company: Coursera

Coursera is hiring an Instructional Designer to develop online learning experiences. 3 years of ID experience required. Salary: $90,000 – $110,000.

School Counselor wanted at a private K-8 school in Scottsdale, AZ. Must hold an Arizona school counseling certification. 2 years of school counseling experience preferred. Salary $52,000 – $62,000 depending on experience.

Curriculum Developer
Khan Academy | Remote (US)

Khan Academy is hiring a Curriculum Developer for K-12 math content. We prefer 4+ years of curriculum writing experience and a strong math background. Salary range: $80,000 – $100,000.

Special Education Teacher
Los Angeles Unified School District | Los Angeles, CA

LAUSD is seeking credentialed Special Education Teachers. Experience preferred but student teachers encouraged to apply. Starting salary $64,000 with step increases.

ESL Instructor — Part-time, On-site
Location: Philadelphia, PA
A community college is hiring a part-time ESL Instructor. 1 year of ESL teaching experience required. Pay: $30/hr. Institution not named.

Dean of Students
Miami University | Oxford, OH

Miami University invites applications for Dean of Students. A minimum of 10 years of progressive higher education experience required. Salary is commensurate with qualifications.

Education Data Analyst
Remote | Company: NWEA

NWEA is hiring an Education Data Analyst to support assessment research. 2-4 years of data analysis experience required. Salary: $70,000 – $85,000.

Teaching Assistant (Graduate)
Stanford University | Stanford, CA

Stanford's Computer Science department is recruiting PhD student Teaching Assistants for introductory programming courses. Stipend: $3,500/month plus tuition. No prior TA experience required.

Store Manager
Trader Joe's | Boulder, CO

Trader Joe's is looking for a Store Manager with 3+ years of retail management experience. Salary: $75,000 – $90,000 plus bonus and profit sharing.

E-commerce Manager — Remote

A DTC beauty brand is hiring an E-commerce Manager to own their Shopify storefront. 4 years of e-commerce experience required. Salary $85,000 – $100,000. Brand name not disclosed.

Merchandise Buyer
Nordstrom | Seattle, WA

Nordstrom is seeking a Merchandise Buyer for the Women's Apparel division. 3 years of buying experience preferred. Competitive salary, details shared with candidates.

Category Manager — Amazon
Seattle, WA

Amazon's Consumables team is hiring a Category Manager. 5 years of retail or category management experience required. Total compensation: $130,000 – $165,000 including RSUs.

Loss Prevention Specialist
On-site | Las Vegas, NV
Retail chain (undisclosed). Entry-level role — previous LP experience helpful but not required. $20/hr starting pay.

Visual Merchandiser
Anthropologie | New York, NY

Anthropologie is hiring a Visual Merchandiser for its flagship NYC store. 2 years of visual merchandising experience preferred. Pay: $22 – $26/hr.

Retail Data Analyst
Target | Minneapolis, MN

Target's merchandising analytics team has an opening for a Retail Data Analyst. 3 years of analytics experience with Python or R required. Salary $85,000 – $105,000.

Fulfillment Center Supervisor
Location: Sparks, NV
Company: Chewy

Chewy is hiring Fulfillment Center Supervisors for our Nevada distribution center. 2 years of warehouse leadership experience required. $60,000/year base.

Customer Experience Manager

A subscription box company in Austin, TX is hiring its first CX Manager. Looking for someone with 4+ years in customer support leadership. Salary not listed — competitive package offered.

Supply Chain Analyst
Walmart eCommerce | Bentonville, AR

Join Walmart's supply chain team. We need a Supply Chain Analyst with 2-3 years of logistics or demand planning experience. Base salary: $65,000 – $80,000.

Manufacturing Engineer
Boeing | Everett, WA

Boeing Commercial Airplanes is hiring a Manufacturing Engineer to support the 737 program. 3+ years of aerospace manufacturing experience required. Salary: $90,000 – $115,000.

Quality Control Inspector
On-site | Detroit, MI

Automotive parts supplier (name confidential) is hiring Quality Control Inspectors. 1 year of QC experience in a manufacturing environment required. Pay: $19 – $23/hr.

Process Engineer — Procter & Gamble
Cincinnati, OH

P&G is hiring a Process Engineer for our Home Care manufacturing site. 2-5 years of chemical manufacturing experience preferred. We offer a competitive salary — full details in the offer stage.

Plant Manager
Location: Greenville, SC
Industry: Automotive

A Tier 1 automotive supplier is seeking a Plant Manager with 10+ years of manufacturing leadership experience. Salary: $130,000 – $160,000 plus bonus. Employer confidential.

CNC Machinist
Lockheed Martin | Fort Worth, TX

Lockheed Martin Aeronautics is hiring CNC Machinists. 3 years of CNC experience required; aerospace experience a plus. Pay: $28 – $34/hr.

Safety Coordinator

A food processing plant in Fresno, CA is looking for a Safety Coordinator. OSHA 30-hour certification required; 2 years of EHS experience preferred. Salary: $55,000 – $68,000/year.

Production Supervisor — Night Shift
General Mills | Buffalo, NY

General Mills is hiring a Production Supervisor for our overnight manufacturing operations. 3+ years of food production experience required. $75,000 base salary plus shift differential.

Maintenance Technician
On-site | Albuquerque, NM

Chemical manufacturer (confidential) seeking an experienced Maintenance Technician. Minimum 5 years industrial maintenance experience. Pay not listed; competitive for the region.

Industrial Designer
Dyson | Chicago, IL

Dyson is expanding its North American design studio. We're looking for an Industrial Designer with 4 years of consumer product design experience. Salary: $95,000 – $120,000.

Supply Chain Manager
Honeywell | Phoenix, AZ

Honeywell Performance Materials is hiring a Supply Chain Manager to oversee sourcing and logistics for our specialty chemicals division. 7+ years required. Salary commensurate with experience.

Policy Analyst
U.S. Department of Energy | Washington, DC

The DOE Office of Energy Efficiency is hiring a Policy Analyst (GS-12). 2 years of energy policy research experience required. Salary: $89,834 – $116,788/year (GS-12 scale).

Grant Writer — Nonprofit
Remote | Habitat for Humanity International

Habitat for Humanity is seeking a Grant Writer with 3 years of foundation grant writing experience. Salary: $60,000 – $72,000.

Urban Planner
City of San Jose, CA

The City of San Jose's Planning Division is hiring an Urban Planner. AICP certification preferred. 4 years of municipal planning experience required. Salary: $95,000 – $115,000.

Licensed Clinical Social Worker

A nonprofit mental health organization in Minneapolis, MN is hiring an LCSW. 2 years post-licensure experience required. $58,000 – $68,000 salary plus generous PTO. Organization name withheld.

Environmental Scientist
EPA Region 9 | San Francisco, CA

The US EPA is recruiting an Environmental Scientist to support Superfund site assessments. GS-11 pay scale: $80,000 – $104,000. 3 years of environmental field experience required.

Program Coordinator
AmeriCorps | Remote (occasional travel)

AmeriCorps is hiring a Program Coordinator to manage volunteer corps in the Southeast. 2 years of program management experience preferred. Salary: $50,000 – $60,000.

Public Health Officer
County of Los Angeles Department of Public Health | Los Angeles, CA

LA County Public Health is hiring. MPH required. 5 years of public health program experience. Salary TBD based on experience and classification.

text:
Budget Analyst
Department of Veterans Affairs | Washington, DC

VA is hiring a Budget Analyst (GS-13). 5 years of federal budget or financial management experience required. Salary: $112,015 – $145,617/year.

Community Outreach Coordinator

A nonprofit in Denver, CO focused on housing equity is seeking a bilingual Community Outreach Coordinator. 1 year of community organizing experience preferred. $42,000 – $48,000/year. Org name not listed.

Foreign Service Officer
U.S. Department of State | Washington, DC (with overseas postings)

The State Department is accepting applications for Foreign Service Officers. US citizenship required. No specific years of experience required — selected through competitive exam. Starting salary $57,510/year.

Digital Marketing Manager
HubSpot | Remote (US)

HubSpot is hiring a Digital Marketing Manager to lead paid and organic acquisition. 5 years of B2B digital marketing experience required. Salary: $110,000 – $135,000.

Brand Strategist

A CPG company in New York is looking for a Brand Strategist with 4 years of brand planning experience at an agency or in-house. Salary range not posted at this time.

SEO Specialist
Moz | Seattle, WA or Remote

Moz is hiring an SEO Specialist. 3 years of technical SEO experience required. Salary: $75,000 – $90,000.

Social Media Manager
Location: Los Angeles, CA
Full-time, on-site

Entertainment company seeking a Social Media Manager with 2 years of managing brand accounts. Pay: $55,000 – $65,000. Employer name withheld.

Copywriter — Wieden+Kennedy
Portland, OR

Wieden+Kennedy is looking for a mid-level Copywriter with 3-5 years of creative agency experience. Salary is competitive; package disclosed during the offer stage.

Media Planner
GroupM | New York, NY

GroupM is hiring a Media Planner. 2 years of media planning or buying experience required. Salary $60,000 – $75,000 based on experience.

Creative Director

A boutique creative agency in Nashville, TN seeks a Creative Director with 8+ years of experience leading brand campaigns. Salary negotiable — expected $120,000 – $150,000. Agency name disclosed at interview.

Marketing Data Analyst
Spotify | New York, NY (hybrid)

Spotify is hiring a Marketing Data Analyst to measure campaign effectiveness. 3 years of marketing analytics experience required. Salary: $95,000 – $115,000.

Growth Marketing Manager
Duolingo | Pittsburgh, PA or Remote

Duolingo's growth team is expanding. 4+ years of performance marketing experience. Total comp: $120,000 – $145,000 including equity.

Public Relations Manager
Tesla | Austin, TX

Tesla's communications team is looking for a PR Manager with 5 years of corporate PR experience. Salary details shared with shortlisted candidates.

Management Consultant
McKinsey & Company | Multiple US offices

McKinsey is hiring MBA-level Management Consultants. 0-2 years post-MBA work experience expected. Starting salary $190,000 plus performance bonus.

Strategy Consultant

A boutique strategy firm in Washington, DC is looking for a Strategy Consultant with 3-5 years of management consulting or corporate strategy experience. Salary: $130,000 – $160,000. Firm name not disclosed.

IT Consultant — Deloitte
New York, NY (project travel required)

Deloitte is hiring IT Consultants for its Technology Transformation practice. 2+ years of ERP implementation experience required. Salary: $95,000 – $120,000.

HR Consultant — Remote

A people consulting firm is adding an HR Consultant with expertise in compensation benchmarking. 4 years of HR consulting experience required. $90,000 – $110,000 salary. Firm name withheld.

Business Analyst
Accenture | Chicago, IL

Accenture's Strategy & Consulting group is hiring Business Analysts. Recent graduates welcome. Starting salary $75,000/year with annual reviews.

Operations Consultant
Bain & Company | Boston, MA

Bain is looking for an Operations Consultant with 2-4 years of supply chain or operations experience. Compensation is competitive — details shared during interview.

Risk Consultant
PwC | San Francisco, CA

PwC's Risk Assurance group has an opening for a Risk Consultant. 3 years of internal audit or risk consulting experience preferred. Salary $90,000 – $115,000.

Change Management Consultant — Remote

A management consulting firm (name withheld) is seeking a Change Management Consultant with a Prosci certification. 5+ years required. $115,000 – $140,000.

Implementation Specialist
Salesforce | Remote (US)

Salesforce Professional Services is hiring Implementation Specialists. 2 years of Salesforce platform experience and a Salesforce Administrator cert required. Salary: $85,000 – $100,000.

Financial Consultant
Edward Jones | Multiple locations

Edward Jones is hiring Financial Consultants in branches nationwide. No financial industry experience required — we train. Year 1 compensation averages $50,000 – $75,000; growth potential is significant.

Video Editor
Netflix | Los Angeles, CA

Netflix is hiring a Video Editor for promotional content. 4 years of experience with Premiere Pro and After Effects required. Salary: $100,000 – $130,000.

Investigative Journalist

A regional newspaper in Tampa, FL is seeking an Investigative Journalist with 3+ years of reporting experience. Salary $52,000 – $62,000. Publication name withheld.

Podcast Producer
NPR | Washington, DC

NPR is looking for a Podcast Producer to join a new audio storytelling initiative. 3 years of audio production experience required. Salary: $70,000 – $85,000.

Game Developer (Unreal Engine)
Epic Games | Cary, NC

Epic Games is hiring a Game Developer with 3+ years of Unreal Engine experience for our Fortnite team. Salary: $120,000 – $150,000.

3D Animator
Pixar Animation Studios | Emeryville, CA

Pixar is hiring a 3D Animator for an upcoming feature film. 5 years of character animation experience required. Compensation details provided to candidates.

Broadcast Engineer
CBS News | New York, NY

CBS News is hiring a Broadcast Engineer to maintain live transmission infrastructure. 4 years of broadcast engineering experience required. Salary: $85,000 – $100,000.

Content Strategist — Remote

A B2B SaaS company is looking for a Content Strategist with 3 years of experience in content marketing. $80,000 – $95,000 salary. Company name not disclosed.

Music Producer

Independent recording studio in Nashville, TN seeking a Music Producer with 5+ years of experience producing commercially released recordings. Project-based pay, approximately $80,000 – $120,000/year depending on volume.

Social Media Content Creator
Red Bull | Santa Monica, CA

Red Bull's in-house content team is hiring a Social Media Content Creator. 2 years of short-form video creation experience required. Salary: $60,000 – $72,000.

Film Director of Photography

An independent production company in New York is seeking a Director of Photography for a feature documentary. Union (IATSE) rates apply. No company name disclosed.

Civil Engineer — AECOM
Denver, CO

AECOM's transportation group is hiring a Civil Engineer with 4 years of highway design experience. Salary: $85,000 – $105,000.

Mechanical Engineer
SpaceX | Hawthorne, CA

SpaceX is hiring Mechanical Engineers for Starship structures. 2+ years of aerospace or mechanical design experience. Salary not listed; highly competitive total comp.

Electrical Engineer
Intel | Hillsboro, OR

Intel's Logic Technology Development group is seeking an Electrical Engineer. 3-7 years of semiconductor or process engineering experience. Salary: $110,000 – $145,000.

Chemical Engineer

A chemical manufacturing company in Baton Rouge, LA is hiring a Chemical Engineer with 2+ years of process engineering experience. $80,000 – $100,000 base salary. Company not disclosed.

Aerospace Engineer
NASA Jet Propulsion Laboratory | Pasadena, CA

JPL is hiring Aerospace Engineers to support planetary mission design. 3 years post-graduate experience preferred. GS equivalent pay scale; salary details at offer stage.

Environmental Engineer
Jacobs Engineering | Atlanta, GA

Jacobs is hiring an Environmental Engineer with 4 years of remediation project experience. PE license preferred. Salary: $90,000 – $110,000.

Structural Engineer
KPFF Consulting Engineers | Portland, OR

KPFF is seeking a licensed Structural Engineer with 5+ years of building structure design experience. SE license required. Salary commensurate with experience — typically $105,000 – $130,000 for this level.

Petroleum Engineer

An oil & gas company operating in the Permian Basin is hiring a Reservoir Engineer. Must have 3+ years of reservoir engineering experience. Houston, TX office. Salary not disclosed.

Biomedical Engineer
Medtronic | Minneapolis, MN

Medtronic is hiring a Biomedical Engineer for its cardiac rhythm management division. 2-4 years of medical device development experience required. Salary: $85,000 – $105,000.

Nuclear Engineer
U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission | Rockville, MD

The NRC is recruiting Nuclear Engineers at the GS-12 level. 3 years of nuclear power plant or regulatory experience required. Salary: $89,834 – $116,788.

Associate Attorney — Litigation
Latham & Watkins | Los Angeles, CA

Latham & Watkins is hiring 3rd-5th year litigation associates. Salary follows the Cravath scale: $260,000 – $330,000 for years 3-5.

Paralegal — Real Estate

A mid-size real estate law firm in Phoenix, AZ is hiring a Real Estate Paralegal. 2 years of real estate transactional experience required. Salary $55,000 – $68,000. Firm name undisclosed.

Contract Specialist
Department of Defense | Arlington, VA

The DoD is hiring Contract Specialists (GS-1102). 2 years of federal contracting experience and FAC-C certification required. Salary: $72,750 – $94,581/year.

Compliance Analyst
Johnson & Johnson | New Brunswick, NJ

J&J is hiring a Compliance Analyst for its medical devices regulatory team. 3 years of FDA regulatory compliance experience required. Salary not posted.

Legal Operations Manager — Remote

A Fortune 500 company is building out its legal ops function. Looking for a Legal Operations Manager with 6 years of experience in legal project management or e-discovery. $130,000 – $155,000. Company undisclosed.

Patent Attorney
IBM | Armonk, NY (hybrid)

IBM's IP Law group is hiring a Patent Attorney with a technical background in semiconductors or AI. 4+ years of patent prosecution experience required. Salary: $180,000 – $220,000.

Corporate Counsel
Airbnb | San Francisco, CA

Airbnb is looking for a Corporate Counsel with 5-8 years of M&A or securities experience. Total comp $250,000 – $320,000 including RSUs.

Immigration Attorney

A solo immigration law firm in Houston, TX is seeking an Immigration Attorney with 2+ years of removal defense experience. Spanish fluency required. Salary $75,000 – $90,000. Firm name not listed.

Compass | Miami, FL

Compass is recruiting experienced Real Estate Agents for its South Florida team. Must hold a Florida real estate license. 2+ years of residential sales experience. Commission-based; top agents earn $150,000+/year.

Property Manager

A residential property management company in Denver, CO is hiring a Property Manager for a 250-unit apartment community. 3 years of multifamily management experience required. Salary $55,000 – $65,000 plus leasing bonuses. Company name withheld.

CBRE | Dallas, TX

CBRE's Capital Markets group is hiring a Commercial Real Estate Analyst. 2 years of CRE analysis experience required. Salary $75,000 – $90,000 base.

Logistics Coordinator

A third-party logistics company in Memphis, TN is hiring a Logistics Coordinator. 1-2 years of freight or carrier management experience preferred. $45,000 – $55,000/year. Company not named.

CH Robinson | Eden Prairie, MN

Principal Software Engineer

AI safety research organization seeking a Research Scientist. PhD in ML, statistics, or related field. 2+ years post-PhD research experience. Compensation: $200,000 – $300,000 depending on experience.

Smile Brands | Tempe, AZ

Accountant (CPA)

Capital One | McLean, VA

Veterinarian

Network Engineer

Cisco is hiring a Network Engineer with 4 years of enterprise networking experience. CCIE preferred. Salary $120,000 – $145,000.

Atlanta, GA

Interior Designer

A residential design studio in Scottsdale, AZ is looking for an Interior Designer with 3 years of high-end residential project experience. Salary $55,000 – $70,000. Studio name not listed.

Meta is hiring a Talent Acquisition Specialist for technical recruiting. 3-5 years of full-cycle technical recruiting experience required. Salary: $115,000 – $135,000.

Geologist

Database Administrator

NextEra Energy | Juno Beach, FL
